text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, I ran confidently thanks to you,<n>Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! I saw! Your tenacious<n>running
brought a tear to my eye!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Two opposites drawn together,their rivalry pushing them to grow evenstronger, and maybe even closer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's giving me all the feels! OTP of the<n>Year, right
here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I don't know what you're saying,<n>but I sense
you are showing reverence<n>toward your Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As a sign of my gratitude, I shall appoint<n>you an
honorary citizen of the Kingdom<n>of T.M. Opera!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm an honorary citizen? Of your<n>kingdom?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I couldn't possibly! This is more than I<n>can
handle!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-are you okay, Digital?! If you're not<n>feeling
well, I'll take you to the<n>infirmary!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: COUGH! And now you want to be myescort?! My oshis, you are toogenerous...
